svg.title: Enclosure Tub — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
svg.text: Material: ASA | All dimensions in mm | Scale as noted per view

g.text: 1. Exterior vertical edges: R8 (all 4). Bottom edges: R2 (all 4).
2. All aperture edges chamfered 1.0 mm on exterior side.
3. Tongue runs continuous around full perimeter, following corner radii.
4. 8 snap catches total: 2 per side (front, back, left, right).
5. Valve cradles: 2 rows of 5, 36 mm X pitch, Y centre = 220 mm.
6. Rear bulkhead: 5 JG PP0408W fittings, 9.1 mm press-fit bore, 6 mm local wall thickness.
7. Dock JG stubs: 4 fittings at X=75/145, Z=55/75 in dock rear wall.
8. Walls vertical (no draft). Cap provides all taper.
